examples: This confirms what, as a psychoanalyst, I have been writing about for decades.
So, one day he stops seeing the psychoanalyst and decides to trysomething different.
One doctor had this response: "What is the difference between a plastic surgeon and a psychoanalyst?"
Like Investigator Petrovich, Inspector Rheinhardt has a sidekick, a Jewish psychoanalyst, Dr Max Liebermann.
"This generation is very focused and they will achieve their goals with single-minded purpose, " says a leading psychoanalyst.
